title: NIH Roadmap Epigenomics Mapping Consortium RNA Data
author: Breeze, Charles
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
NIH Roadmap Epigenomics Mapping Consortium RNA Data  
 Data presented here are from the following publication: 
 Kundaje*, Meuleman*, Ernst*, Bilenky* et al. Integrative analysis of 111 reference human epigenomes. Nature 518, 317–330 (2015). https://doi.org/10.1038/nature14248 
 
 RNA data (including README) are available at: roadmap.rna.tar.gz               These data were downloaded from https://egg2.wustl.edu/roadmap/data/byDataType/rna/ 
 
 Addendum: 
 
 DNA methylation, Chromatin State, and DNase-seq and ChIP-seq Peak data can be found at https://zenodo.org/records/15429471 
 Consolidated Imputed peaks can be found at https://zenodo.org/uploads/15465558
